---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Motivation

What problem does this feature solve, or what use-case does it enable?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or change you'd like to see. Be as specific as you can —
CLI flags, API shape, file format changes, etc.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered other approaches? Why is this the best solution?

## Additional Context

Any references, links, or prior art that would help evaluate the proposal.
